semantic.role: Rule definition document for the ArchSpine demo project, enforcing specific architectural constraints.
responsibilities: Define a Layer Isolation rule preventing API layer from directly importing infrastructure modules.
Define a Documentation rule requiring TSDoc comments for public domain classes and methods.
Specify severity levels (error, warning) and rationale for each rule.
Provide scoped targets (src/api/**, src/domain/**) for rule application.
outOfScope: Rules for layers beyond API and domain (e.g., infrastructure, tests, deployment).
Detailed implementation patterns for fixing violations.

English.purpose: To codify specific architectural boundaries and documentation expectations for the demo project under ArchSpine, ensuring consistent enforcement by both humans and automated tools.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for project developers and AI agents maintaining the demo project. These rules guide code changes and reviews within the project scope.
key_takeaways: API handlers must not directly import from src/infra/; use domain layer as intermediary.
All public domain classes and methods must have TSDoc comments.
Violations of Layer Isolation are errors; missing documentation is a warning.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 为 ArchSpine 演示项目确立具体的架构边界和文档规范，确保人工与自动化工具一致地执行这些约束。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向维护该演示项目的开发者与 AI 代理。这些规则在项目范围内指导代码变更与审查。
key_takeaways: API 处理程序不得直接导入 src/infra/；应通过领域层进行中转。
所有公开的领域类和方法必须包含 TSDoc 注释。
违反层隔离规则视为错误；缺少文档则作为警告处理。
